name: convert
when_to_use: 需要类型安全、可摇树且覆盖物理量与数据单位的现代单位换算核时用它而非手写,因为原生在合法单位 token、量类兼容性和温度偏移上会失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认会混用缩写与全称、跨量类误换或漏掉温度偏移；该库同时在 TypeScript 编译期和运行时校验单位,并给出确定的换算结果。

data_in.note: data_in 精确映射到 convert(value, from).to(to)；JSON 输入只收 number,不收 JavaScript bigint；from/to 使用 v7 原生 Unit 字符串。

schema.to: string —— 与 from 同量类的 v7 Unit token；本条不接特殊目标 'best',以保证输出恒为 number

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵；ESM、零运行时依赖。
provides.outputs: 目标单位下的 number；未知单位或跨量类换算在运行时抛错。

api_surface.many: convertMany(expression).to(to) → number,适合 '4d 16h' 这类复合时间字符串

peer.note: 本条只产标量；TypeScript 消费者可直接复用上游 Unit 类型,普通 widget 则应从应用自己的有限单位列表生成控件。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a modern, type-safe, tree-shakeable unit-conversion core covering physical quantities and data units instead of handwritten conversion, which tends to fail on valid unit tokens, quantity-class compatibility, and temperature offsets.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults to mixing abbreviations with full names, converting across incompatible quantity classes, or omitting temperature offsets. This library validates units both at TypeScript compile time and at runtime, then returns deterministic conversions.

data_in.note: data_in maps exactly to convert(value, from).to(to). JSON input accepts only number, not JavaScript bigint. from/to use native v7 Unit strings.

schema.from: string -- v7 Unit token, for example 'miles'|'km'|'pounds'|'bytes'|'fahrenheit'|'seconds'
schema.to: string -- a v7 Unit token in the same quantity class as from; this entry does not accept the special target 'best', ensuring that output is always number

boot.note: jsDelivr +esm 已核对 default/named convert 导出；上游包还支持 bigint,但 strict JSON data_in 无 bigint,故本条明确裁掉。

isolation.evidence: convert@7.0.0 +esm exports 'l as convert,l as default,q as convertMany,z as getMeasureKind,v as ms,h as MeasureKind' — default IS convert, so 'import convert from ...' resolves to the function; matches convert.d.ts signature convert<Q,U>(quantity:Q, from:U):Converter, i.e. convert(value,from).to(to). All api_surface members (convertMany, ms, getMeasureKind) are real named exports. Schema correctly restricts to JSON number (bigint path cut). Headless-primitive, zero-dependency ESM, pure computation — no DOM/style/event side effects, fully shadow-safe.
